analysis:
Tested the state-of-the-art previous focal loss but extended training epochs from 120 to 150 to allow the cosine annealing scheduler a longer tail.
Result: 0.67403, surpassing the previous record of 0.6738.
Conclusion: The standard, bottlenecked MLP [3072 -> 2048 -> 1024 -> 3474] trained with a Normalized Symmetric Focal loss and extended epochs is the best architecture. The hierarchical ASL penalty from the hypothesis degrades performance.
